channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: End of road leading to 3 footpaths, very uneven with grass growing over. Damage caused by stream bursting banks., 18th May
item.description:
Very end of Chapel Lane. Leading to 3 footpaths to shops schools etc. These are used by elderly people going to local shops or to bishops cleeve and children going to primary & secondary schools. The damage has been getting worse gradually over last few years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sydenham Rd North tree problem., 18th May
item.description:
Impossible to use footpath due to foliage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Sydenham Road North, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers have been there for months., 18th May
item.description:
Barriers blocking whole width of the footpath. In Cranham Rd about 20 yards up from Sydenham Rd South.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Cranham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: 2 way signals in use however no sign of any work being done and website sugests it will be finished by Friday 15th may., 18th May
item.description:
Old Gloucester road outside hayden nurseries and just before pilgrove way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Front Bumper on Grass Verge, 18th May
item.description:
Car Front Bumper on grassverge from a recent accident. Environmental damage consideration and would be an issue when machinery cutting the verge and not seeing this if the grasses and other vegetation grow around it hiding it from sight.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate van parking, 18th May
item.description:
Inappropriate van parking, causing possible accidents and obstruction to the public using the path . Every day this van has been parked causing dangerous obstruction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Fairhaven Avenue, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Outside 19 Ravensgate Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Ravensgate Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Metal cover in road not finished correctly when road resurface cause rapid deterioration of new surface., 18th May
item.description:
Opposite car park entrance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Christowe Lane, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding outside 146/144 brooklyn Road Cheltenham, 18th May
item.description:
We recently received an update informing us that this case was closed. As you can see in the photos, nothing has changed. These photos were taken after a short but heavy rainfall. If there is prolonged heavy rain the water is at the front door of our property and I have to put sandbags against the door and airbricks to prevent severe damage to our house. This issue has NOT been resolved!!!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road edges very dirty and gravelly, 18th May
item.description:
The road edges are very clogged up with gravel and silt. Obscuring double yellow lines in some places

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Back Albert Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes now merge into one, 18th May
item.description:
On the cut through road from Cirencester Road (10 yards up from Langton Place) to Cudnall Street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langton Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole in parking bay at end of Millbrook Gardens, 18th May
item.description:
In the parking bay opposite 53 Millbrook Gardens. The residents are concerned that, from appearances, this hole will get larger and that the surrounding area is unsafe. It is very deep.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Millbrook Gardens, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree outside 188 Gloucester road Cheltenham, 18th May
item.description:
The tree has some branches that are unstable and we are concerned will fall down in the wind and cause injury

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 190, Gloucester Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and weed roots affecting my fence, 18th May
item.description:
On the path next to 1a Willow Close, GL52 9TU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keepers Mill, Tewkesbury

item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th May

item.title: The drain of two and others in whole carpark blocked some fill of mud and damaged, 18th May
item.description:
In the carpark behind 13 yewtreeway and 9 oakhurst close way in oakhurst close pinpoint won't let me put problem aria google never came in carpark believe it's tewksbury borough
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakhurst Close, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: Hazard-prone Overgrown Tree, 18th May
item.description:
Location: Footpath between 1 Valley Cottages and Brookfield Valley Cottages My fence backs directly onto the footpath. As you can see from the photo, the trees and plants are severely overgrown and are pressing against the fence, which is now on the verge of collapsing. I have a toddler who plays in the garden, so this presents a serious safety concern. The whole footpath looks abandoned as well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Gloucester Road, Golden Valley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
